entities.name: LIVESTOCK
entities.description: Animals used for productivity in the West African Sahel

entities.name: WEST AFRICAN SAHEL
entities.description: Region where livestock productivity is constrained by seasonal feed scarcity

entities.name: FEED SCARCITY
entities.description: Seasonal lack of livestock feed resources

entities.name: FEED QUALITY
entities.description: The nutritional value of livestock feed, which is low in the dry season

entities.name: DRY SEASON
entities.description: Period characterized by feed scarcity and low feed quality

entities.name: LIVESTOCK POPULATION
entities.description: The number of livestock, which increases the demand for feed

entities.name: PERIURBAN AREAS
entities.description: Areas surrounding cities where feed demand is heightened

entities.name: LIVESTOCK FEED MARKETS
entities.description: Markets established in cities and towns for the sale and purchase of livestock feed

entities.name: MARADI
entities.description: A city in Niger where livestock feed market surveys were conducted

entities.name: NIAMEY
entities.description: A city in Niger where livestock feed market surveys were conducted

entities.name: NIGER
entities.description: The country where the study on livestock feed markets was conducted

entities.name: SURVEYS
entities.description: Research method used to understand the dynamics of livestock feed markets

entities.name: SEMI-STRUCTURED QUESTIONNAIRE
entities.description: The tool used to conduct surveys in Maradi and Niamey

entities.name: WET SEASON
entities.description: The period of the year characterized by higher feed availability

entities.name: COWPEA
entities.description: A legume whose hay and husk are used as livestock feed

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume whose haulm is used as livestock feed

entities.name: LEGUME RESIDUES
entities.description: Feed types including cowpea hay, cowpea husk, and groundnut haulm

entities.name: FEED PRICE
entities.description: The cost of livestock feed, which varies by season, location, and feed type

entities.name: ANIMAL PERFORMANCE
entities.description: The productivity and health of livestock maintained by supplementary feeds
